name: CleverTap Customer Engagement API
what_it_does: CleverTap REST API for real-time customer engagement and mobile analytics platform. Enables AI agents to upload user profiles and events, trigger targeted campaigns, retrieve segmentation and funnel analytics, access retention cohort data, and integrate CleverTap behavioral data into marketing and product workflows. CleverTap focuses on retention and lifecycle marketing.
use_cases: Uploading user events and profile data from product instrumentation agents
Triggering lifecycle marketing campaigns from retention optimization agents
Retrieving funnel and cohort analytics from product analytics agents
Managing user segments and targeting from marketing automation agents
not_for: B2B SaaS without consumer mobile focus
Low-volume apps without meaningful retention needs
best_when: A consumer mobile app using CleverTap wants AI agents to analyze retention, trigger lifecycle campaigns, and integrate behavioral data into product and marketing workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: User behavioral data, device identifiers, and retention tracking require consent disclosures under GDPR/CCPA. CleverTap builds detailed user profiles.

auth.notes: CleverTap API uses Account ID + Account Passcode as HTTP headers (X-CleverTap-Account-Id, X-CleverTap-Passcode). Account-scoped credentials from CleverTap dashboard.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: up to 5,000 monthly active users; limited features
pricing.paid_tiers: Essentials, Advanced, and Cutting Edge plans scaling MAU
pricing.notes: India-headquartered, publicly traded company. Competitive pricing for mobile engagement.

performance.rate_limits: 1000 requests per minute per account; upload limits per batch

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Detailed user behavioral profiles require GDPR/CCPA consent and disclosure
No public MCP server — REST API with header-based API key auth
Region-specific API endpoints — US, EU, SG, IN have different base URLs
Batch upload limits apply — profile uploads limited to 1000 records per request
Rate limit of 1000 req/min — implement exponential back-off for high-volume event uploads
CleverTap identity management (CTID, custom identity) requires careful design
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Detailed consumer behavioral profiles. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, CCPA. Header-based API key auth. Multi-region data residency including EU.

security_score_components.security_notes: Consumer behavioral profiles. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, CCPA. Header API key auth. Multi-region.
